title: March 27
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|March}}

'''March 27''' is the 86th day of the year (87th in leap years). There are 279 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1930s#1935|1935]] – [[Julian Glover]] is born.
*[[1940s#1942|1942]] – [[Michael York]] is born.
*[[1940s#1943|1943]] – [[Grant McCune]] is born.
*[[1950s#1953|1953]] – [[Patricia C. Wrede]] is born.
*[[1960s#1962|1962]] – [[Kevin J. Anderson]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 24|''Star Wars'' (1977) 24]] published
*[[2002]] – ''[[Star Wars: Zam Wesell]]'' published.
*2002 – [[The Official Star Wars Fact File 13|''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 13]] published.
*[[2004]] – [[Peter Diamond]] dies.
*[[2009]] – ''[[Timeline 1: Treaty of Coruscant]]'' released on [http://www.swtor.com StarWarsTheOldRepublic.com].
*2009 – [[Anthony Daniels]] visits [[Star Wars: The Exhibition]] in Madrid.
*[[2014]] – ''[[Sports in the Star Wars Galaxy]]'' Part 1 released on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2018]] – [[Star Wars: Episode VIII The Last Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VIII ''The Last Jedi'']] released on 4K and Blu-ray.
*[[2019]] – [[Vader - Dark Visions 2|''Vader - Dark Visions'' 2]] published.
*2019 – [[Doctor Aphra (2016) 30|''Doctor Aphra'' (2016) 30]] published.
*2019 – [[Star Wars Adventures (2017) 19|''Star Wars Adventures'' (2017) 19]] published.
*[[2020]] – "[[Deal No Deal]]" airs on [[Disney+]].
*2020 – "[[BB-8 - A Hero Rolls Out]]" is uploaded on YouTube.''
*[[2024]] – "[[The Harbinger]]" airs on Disney+.
*2024 – [[Obi-Wan Kenobi 6|''Obi-Wan Kenobi'' 6]] published.
*2024 – ''[[The High Republic Adventures: Crash Landing]]'' published.
